summary: A high-spec open plan reception and kitchen area presented in clean, well maintained decorative order overall. The room appears bright and contemporary with neutral finishes, integrated appliances and coordinated furniture, though a number of visible furnishings show light-to-moderate wear and marking. The kitchen fittings and structural surfaces are generally in good condition, with localized marks noted to some upholstered items, painted walls and a small area of door damage.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth white painted ceiling with recessed downlights, smoke alarm and ceiling-mounted air vent/extract grille within a boxed bulkhead to the kitchen area.
defects: light marks visible to ceiling around recessed fittings

items.name: Walls
items.description: Smooth emulsioned walls in a light neutral beige/magnolia finish throughout the reception and kitchen area.
defects: light scuff/marking to walls at chest level and mid level in places
small marks visible to wall near kitchen small appliance shelf
minor marks to wall by doorway and corner

items.name: Skirting boards
items.description: White painted skirting boards throughout the room.
defects: minor contact marks at base of wall corners and around doorway

items.name: Door frames
items.description: White painted door frames and linings to internal doors and cupboard openings.
defects: light wear/marking to frame edges in places

items.name: Internal doors
items.description: White painted internal hinged doors, including a utility/plant cupboard door and a further internal room door.
defects: chip and abrasion to door edge/lock side at mid level on cupboard door
minor scuffing to door faces

items.name: Window and glazed door set
items.description: White framed full-height window and glazed door(s) with roller blinds, opening to a balcony area.
defects: glazing shows light smear/marks in some views
minor dirt/water marks visible to frame and lower sill area

items.name: Roller blinds
items.description: Light neutral roller blinds fitted to the windows and glazed door, with side pull cords visible.
defects: no significant defects visible

items.name: Threshold strip
items.description: Metal threshold strip at the balcony door and between flooring changes by the utility area.
defects: light wear visible to threshold strip

items.name: Timber effect flooring
items.description: Wide plank light oak-effect timber flooring laid throughout the open plan room.
defects: minor scuffs and darker marks visible in isolated areas on floorboards
light wear to surface in traffic areas

items.name: Recessed downlights
items.description: Ceiling recessed LED downlights.

items.name: Smoke alarm
items.description: White ceiling-mounted smoke alarm.

items.name: Wall switches and sockets
items.description: Black and chrome wall-mounted electrical switches and double sockets positioned at various points around the room.
defects: minor wear to surrounding paintwork in places

items.name: Air vent / extract grille
items.description: Long linear ceiling-mounted air conditioning vent or extract grille set into the boxed bulkhead above the kitchen area.

items.name: Pendant light fittings
items.description: Three decorative hanging pendant lights with exposed filament bulbs over the kitchen island.

items.name: Round dining table
items.description: Small round table with white marble-effect top and dark pedestal base.

items.name: Dining chairs
items.description: Grey upholstered dining chairs with slim black legs; four visible around the table.
defects: light shading/wear to seat and back panels

items.name: Three-seat sofa
items.description: Grey upholstered three-seat sofa with tufted seat base, loose cushions and cylindrical bolster cushion.
defects: visible dark marking and wear to seat cushion front left area
dark smudging/scuffing to back cushion and arm areas
general flattening and wear consistent with use

items.name: Armchair
items.description: Light grey upholstered occasional armchair with metal frame/base legs.
defects: light marks to upholstery on backrest and seat area

items.name: Round coffee table
items.description: Small round nested/side coffee table with white marble-effect top and black base.

items.name: Area rug
items.description: Rectangular grey and cream patterned rug beneath the coffee tables.
defects: visible flattening and light pile marking in places

items.name: Abstract wall art
items.description: Large framed abstract floral artwork in black, white and gold tones.

items.name: Full-length mirror
items.description: Tall black-framed leaning mirror positioned against the wall in the reception area.

items.name: Sideboard / media cabinet
items.description: Low white marble-effect sideboard with gold-toned legs and drawer/door fronts.

items.name: Kitchen island
items.description: Large white waterfall-edge kitchen island with integrated sink and open shelving to one side.

items.name: Island shelves
items.description: Open shelving built into the side of the kitchen island, painted in dark grey/green finish.

items.name: Kitchen base units
items.description: Handleless dark taupe/grey lower kitchen cabinets with integrated plinths.

items.name: Kitchen wall units
items.description: Handleless dark taupe/grey wall-mounted kitchen cupboards.

items.name: Marble-effect splashback
items.description: Marble-effect splashback panel with under-cabinet lighting behind the cooking area.

items.name: Quartz worktops
items.description: White quartz-style kitchen worktops and island surface.

items.name: Stainless steel sink
items.description: Inset single-bowl stainless steel sink within the kitchen island worktop.
defects: light water spotting/minor residue around sink edge and bowl
small area of residue at right-hand inner edge

items.name: Mixer tap
items.description: Tall black/steel swan-neck mixer tap with single lever control.
defects: light water marks to base visible on worktop

items.name: Integrated electric oven / built-in oven
items.description: Black glass front built-in Miele oven set at eye level in tall cabinetry.

items.name: Integrated combination microwave / oven
items.description: Miele built-in combination microwave/oven in tall housing unit.

items.name: Integrated fridge-freezer
items.description: Tall integrated Miele fridge-freezer with white internal compartments and frost-free freezer drawers.

items.name: Integrated dishwasher
items.description: Fully integrated Miele dishwasher with cutlery basket and internal racking visible.

items.name: Induction hob
items.description: Miele black glass induction hob set into the kitchen worktop.

items.name: Cooker hood
items.description: Underslung integrated extractor hood beneath wall units with metal mesh filter and lighting.

items.name: Coffee machine
items.description: Small black countertop coffee machine/kettle-style appliance on the kitchen work surface.
defects: light limescale/water marking visible to surrounding worktop area

items.name: Cookware and kitchen utensils
items.description: Assorted items including saucepan, frying pan, wooden chopping board, chopping knives, scissors, spoons, forks, tongs and food containers stored in cupboards and drawers.

items.name: Utility cupboard contents
items.description: Assorted utility items including vacuum cleaner, mop/cleaning tools, folded packaging and miscellaneous household accessories stored in the utility cupboard.
defects: general storage clutter visible

items.name: Utility room cabinetry
items.description: White built-in utility cupboard doors and shelving housing laundry and plant equipment.

items.name: Plant/boiler cupboard equipment
items.description: Wall-mounted plant/boiler and ventilation components within the utility cupboard, including control units and pipework.
defects: minor visible storage clutter around equipment

items.name: Washing machine / washer-dryer
items.description: White front-loading Miele washing machine/washer-dryer in utility cupboard.

items.name: Cleaning cupboard panel/door
items.description: White access panel/door in utility cupboard area.
defects: small mark/scratch to lower mid area

items.name: Mirror-backed wall panel / cabinet finish
items.description: Gloss/mirror panel finish adjacent to the kitchen and reception area cabinetry.
